description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a classic rounded, bulging shape and flat top and bottom surfaces. The body is constructed from vertical wooden staves, each subtly textured to suggest wood grain, and is reinforced by two wide metallic hoops—one near the top and one near the bottom. The hoops are silver-gray in color and fastened with visible round rivets, providing both structural integrity and a decorative accent. The top of the barrel is closed, with no visible opening or lid mechanism, and the surface appears slightly worn, indicating use or age. The overall finish is matte with a slight sheen, and the object exudes a rustic, utilitarian charm suitable for urban or industrial settings.
description: A medium-sized, closed wooden barrel with silver metal hoops and a slightly worn, matte finish. The barrel has a classic bulging shape and visible wood grain texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bulging wooden staves and the upper and lower silver metal hoops with rivets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the barrel and the continuous metal hoops, with wood grain details visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted wooden surface and the metallic bands, with minimal visible seams.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same structural features, with the wood and metal details consistent throughout.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
